svg.title: Maharashtra Temple Diary Hero – Dattatreya & Maratha Empire
svg.desc: Hero banner for Maharashtra featuring Lord Dattatreya, Maratha Empire, temples, and Marathi text
svg.text: Land of Temples, Forts & Timeless Devotion
कोटी मंदिरे, एक साम्राज्य, एक भक्ती... महाराष्ट्र! | Many Temples, One Empire, One Devotion... Maharashtra!
